title: Brown Poo Slime Putty, 1 Pack, Turd Poop Prank, Fun Novelty, Magical and Squishy, Stress Relief Fiddle Toy, Great for Children with Autism, Special Needs, ASD, ADHD, SPD (Poo Putty, 1)
features: 💩🎉🍪🎁 BROWN AND SLIMY PUTTY - These delightful droppings can be moulded, shaped, stretched, bounced and you can even watch the Poo Putty melt in your hands! Because the Poo Putty comes from you know where, it’s brown and! A perfect stocking-filler, excellent for party-bags and a great gift for anyone who’s a fan of this magical slime

💩🎉🍪🎁 NON TOXIC AND SAFE - Watch the smile and giggles of your kids as they touch and feel the fluffy poo putty. Suitable for children 3+ but with adult supervision. Our slime products comply with current EU Toy Safety Direct Requirements. CE Certified

💩🎉🍪🎁 MAJESTIC MAGICAL POO - This delightful brown poo can be moulded, shaped, stretched, it's squishy yet slimey! This 3” turd poo putty is a fantastic gooey slimy texture that kids will love. Poo is contained in a plastic tub with detachable lid to make sure that there is no spill. Poo slime is a great stress reliever for young and old

💩🎉🍪🎁 GREAT FOR STRESS RELIEF - The poo putty is a great stress reliever toy. This toy will make your time fly and free your mind from anxiety. You can break it apart and reconnect it again. Has a soothing relief effect like a stress ball. Perfect for kids-being-kids and slightly naughty gags. Unlike the real thing this poop is safe and nontoxic and won’t dry out! Great gift for kids who like the poop emoji

💩🎉🍪🎁 SURPRISE THEM - This is a perfect gift for your slime and prank obsessed ones, make them jump for joy or scream as they see this. Birthdays will be remarkable to have this as a gift. Comes in a handy container - great for keeping it fresh and stops it drying out! Tub Size: 7cm / 2.8” x 2cm / 0.8” approx
